title: Rust
description: A mod allows other blocks or items to also rust
body:
This mod adds other blocks and items and gives it a rusting mechanism.

Added rust mechanism (three rust levels: exposed, weathered, oxidized) for the following blocks and items,
and of course, you can also apply wax to them.

### **Blocks:**
iron_block, iron_bars, iron_trapdoor, iron_door, chain, heavy_weighted_pressure_plate,
lantern, soul_lantern

### **Items:**
equipment: iron_helmet, iron_chestplate, iron_leggings, iron_boots

-     Rusty equipment can lead to reduced armor
-     Wax coated equipment will provide additional protection

Tool: iron_sword, iron_axe, iron_shovel, iron_hoe, iron_pickaxe

-     Rusty tools attacking enemies will give them a tetanus effect but reduce their damage
-     The Waxed tool doesn't have any other special effects, it just won't rust

### **Entity:**
iron_golem

### **Also added a new effect**

tetanus: This will give the entiy extra debuff or damage when it is injure
